Operation 'getVideoStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. The current summary and description are identical and overly simplistic. They lack specificity about what status information is returned, what states are possible, and when an AI agent should use this operation. The improved version clarifies the return value structure, explains the typical use cases (polling, batch monitoring), and provides context about the video generation workflow, making it significantly more useful for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current generation status of a personalized video by its video ID. Returns status information including the current processing state (e.g., queued, processing, completed, failed) and relevant metadata. Use this operation to poll for video completion or monitor batch processing progress.
data.reasoning: The current summary and description are identical and overly simplistic. They lack specificity about what status information is returned, what states are possible, and when an AI agent should use this operation. The improved version clarifies the return value structure, explains the typical use cases (polling, batch monitoring), and provides context about the video generation workflow, making it significantly more useful for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'batchGenerate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on input format specifics, expected outputs, and asynchronous nature of batch processing. Added details about CSV structure, return value (batch ID and status), and clarified that batch processing is asynchronous to help AI agents understand the operation's workflow and when to use status-checking operations.

data.current_description: Generate multiple personalized videos in a batch using CSV data
data.description_suggestion: Generate multiple personalized videos in a single batch operation using CSV data. Accepts CSV file with rows containing personalization parameters for each video. Returns a batch response with batch ID and status information. Enables efficient processing of large-scale video generation requests. Batch processing is asynchronous - use batch ID to track completion status.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on input format specifics, expected outputs, and asynchronous nature of batch processing. Added details about CSV structure, return value (batch ID and status), and clarified that batch processing is asynchronous to help AI agents understand the operation's workflow and when to use status-checking operations.

message: Operation 'generateFromScene' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions capabilities but lacks clarity on what inputs are required, what the operation returns, and when to use it versus storyboard generation. Enhanced description explains the input structure (scene parameters), return value (video ID and status), and differentiates this operation from storyboard-based generation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Generate video with full scene-level control over content, layers, and audio
data.description_suggestion: Generate personalized video with granular scene-level control over content, layers, and audio tracks. Allows direct specification of scene parameters, layer configurations, and audio settings for each scene. Returns video response with video ID and generation status. Provides lower-level control compared to storyboard-based generation, enabling custom video compositions.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions capabilities but lacks clarity on what inputs are required, what the operation returns, and when to use it versus storyboard generation. Enhanced description explains the input structure (scene parameters), return value (video ID and status), and differentiates this operation from storyboard-based generation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all available scenes for the account. Returns a list of scene objects with metadata including scene ID, name, and configuration.
